---
title: "Welcome"
---

## Hello, World!

This is a simple website built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and deployed via GitHub Pages.

### Getting Started

Edit this file (`index.qmd`) to update the home page. Add new `.qmd` files and list them in `_quarto.yml` to create more pages.

### Features

- Write content in Markdown or R/Python code blocks
- Built-in syntax highlighting
- Responsive layout via Bootstrap
